title: Agent Configuration and Setup
description: Developer defines agents with instructions, tools, and output schemas before running

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Defines and configures agents before running them

actors.name: OpenAI Platform
actors.description: Hosts prompt templates and model providers

actors.name: MCP Server
actors.description: Provides Model Context Protocol tool surfaces

actors.name: Runner
actors.description: Executes the configured agent; consumes Agent + RunConfig

use_cases.name: Set Static Instructions
use_cases.description: Pass a plain string as the system prompt via instructions=

use_cases.name: Set Dynamic Instructions
use_cases.description: Pass a callable(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: Agent) -> str as instructions
use_cases.notes: Supports both sync and async callables

use_cases.name: Configure Prompt Template
use_cases.description: Set prompt={id, version, variables} or a DynamicPromptFunction for Responses API
use_cases.notes: Only usable with OpenAI models on Responses API

use_cases.name: Add Function Tools
use_cases.description: Decorate Python functions with @function_tool and pass list to tools=[]

use_cases.name: Configure MCP Servers
use_cases.description: Pass MCPServer instances to mcp_servers=[]; configure via mcp_config dict
use_cases.notes: Developer must call server.connect() before passing to agent; mcp_config keys: convert_schemas_to_strict, failure_error_function

use_cases.name: Set Output Type / Schema
use_cases.description: Set output_type to a Pydantic model, dataclass, TypedDict, or AgentOutputSchemaBase
use_cases.notes: Triggers structured outputs mode; default is str

use_cases.name: Configure Input Guardrails
use_cases.description: Pass list[InputGuardrail] to input_guardrails=; run in parallel before first response

use_cases.name: Configure Output Guardrails
use_cases.description: Pass list[OutputGuardrail] to output_guardrails=; run on final output

use_cases.name: Define Handoffs
use_cases.description: Pass list of Agent or Handoff objects to handoffs=; enables delegation to sub-agents

use_cases.name: Configure Tool Use Behavior
use_cases.description: Set tool_use_behavior to control how tool outputs are handled
options: "run_llm_again" (default) — tool results fed back to LLM

use_cases.name: Tune Model Settings
use_cases.description: Pass ModelSettings(temperature, top_p, tool_choice, ...) to model_settings=

use_cases.name: Attach Lifecycle Hooks
use_cases.description: Pass AgentHooks instance to agent.hooks= for agent-scoped callbacks

use_cases.name: Clone Agent
use_cases.description: Call agent.clone(**overrides) to create a shallow-copy variant

use_cases.name: Expose Agent as Tool
use_cases.description: Call agent.as_tool(tool_name, tool_description, ...) to wrap agent as FunctionTool for other agents

use_cases.name: Configure RunConfig
use_cases.description: Create RunConfig to override model, tracing, guardrails, handoff filters for an entire run
key_fields: call_model_input_filter: CallModelInputFilter — edit input before model call

use_cases.name: Configure Error Handlers
use_cases.description: Pass RunErrorHandlers(max_turns=handler_fn) to handle MaxTurnsExceeded gracefully

use_cases.name: Set SDK-wide Defaults
use_cases.description: Configure global API key, client, model API type, tracing, and logging at startup

key_classes.name: RunConfig
key_classes.description: Run-level overrides applied to the entire Runner.run() invocation

key_classes.name: ModelSettings
key_classes.description: Per-agent or per-run model tuning: temperature, top_p, tool_choice, etc.

key_classes.name: RunOptions
key_classes.description: Arguments for AgentRunner methods: context, max_turns, hooks, run_config, session, error_handlers, etc.

key_relationships: Agent extends AgentBase (inherits name, tools, mcp_servers, mcp_config)
Agent composes list[Handoff | Agent] for delegation
Agent composes AgentHooks for lifecycle callbacks
Agent.as_tool() returns FunctionTool (Agent used as sub-agent tool)
RunConfig overrides Agent-level model/model_settings at run time
RunErrorHandlers plugs into RunOptions passed to Runner
Runner consumes Agent + RunConfig + RunOptions to execute
important_notes: Agent is a @dataclass with __post_init__ that strictly validates all field types
instructions can be str OR async/sync callable(RunContextWrapper, Agent) -> str — resolved at run time via get_system_prompt()
output_type defaults to str; setting it enables OpenAI structured outputs mode
tool_use_behavior='run_llm_again' is default; reset_tool_choice=True prevents tool-call infinite loops
MCP servers must be connected (server.connect()) before passing to agent; developer manages lifecycle
RunConfig.model overrides agent.model for the whole run; model_settings merges (non-null values win)
DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS=10; RunConfig.sandbox: SandboxRunConfig enables sandbox agent execution
SDK globals: set_default_openai_key/client/api must be called before first model call
Tracing is ON by default; OPENAI_AGENTS_TRACE_INCLUDE_SENSITIVE_DATA env var controls data inclusion
Agent.clone() is shallow copy — mutable fields (tools, handoffs) share references unless overridden
